title: Brand Identity & Visual System
description: A complete brand overhaul for a growing company — logo, typography, color system, and a style guide built to scale. Designed for flexibility without sacrificing cohesion.

title: Interactive Web Experience
description: A custom-built site blending editorial layout with smooth scroll interactions and motion. Designed in Figma, built in code, and optimized down to the frame.

title: Short Film & Motion Piece
description: A two-minute visual essay combining original footage, 3D elements, and motion design. Shot, edited, and scored independently — start to finish in three weeks.
